title: Thai Chickpea Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful vegetarian dish made with chickpeas and a variety of Thai ingredients. This recipe is quick to make and can be customized to suit your taste.
instructions: Cook pad thai noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chickpeas, peanuts, and sauce ingredients to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
